unresolved_tensions.title: Dream collision: A distributed vulnerability database for Open Source
unresolved_tensions.topic: A distributed vulnerability database for Open Source
unresolved_tensions.review_basis: Directional governance pressure persists across cycles and lineages, but it is still confined to one source loop (osv.dev); defer rather than promote until a second source context or materially different governance setting corroborates it.
unresolved_tensions.review_notes: Revisit when the same direction appears outside the osv.dev source loop, or when the group splits into materially different governance directions.
